475 N0410F_ANTBTC_DAY_NUM N0410F_ANTBTC_DAY_NUM N0410F Medications Received: Antibiotic Number Days CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates the number of dyas that the resident received an antibiotic in the past seven days or since admission/reentry
